scope.workspace: 8Dionysus public AoA surface touched by antifragility waves 1 through 4
scope.notes: Candidates are pattern-level prompts for Codex and maintainers. They are not assertions that the pattern exists exactly as written.

guardrails: Preserve source receipts, provenance anchors, and bounded proof artifacts.
Prefer merge or move over delete when a better canonical home already exists.
Do not let cleanup grant more authority to routing, stats, memo, SDK, or KAG.
Use owner-local source-of-truth docs before acting on any candidate.

candidates.why_fragile: Repeated doctrine files across repos invite drift and contradictory phrasing.
detection_hints: multiple docs restate the same guardrails with no repo-local ownership reason
seed language copied verbatim into several tracked files
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: Agents-of-Abyss/docs/VIA_NEGATIVA.md or existing owner-local canonical docs
never_delete_without: a check that no source-of-truth doc depends on the removed file
candidates.notes: This is the main via negativa cleanup target after four additive waves.

candidates.why_fragile: Center docs become brittle when they restate repository-local semantics instead of routing to owners.
detection_hints: center doc starts defining repo-local command behavior
layer descriptions expand into owner-local policy
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: short center rules plus links to owner repos
never_delete_without: a surviving center map of layer roles

candidates.why_fragile: Rollback, historical, or restore-only paths inside the active runbook blur the public operator surface.
detection_hints: blocked or archived tracks mixed with current setup and smoke commands
rollback-only commands in active sections
never_delete_without: a confirmed active replacement path for any moved operator flow
candidates.notes: This candidate is directly shaped by ATM10-Agent's existing source-of-truth rules.

candidates.why_fragile: Public status, direction, support claims, and ecosystem context become noisy when repeated across too many docs.
detection_hints: same status paragraph appears in README, MANIFEST, and ROADMAP
support boundary repeated outside product-edge posture
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: MANIFEST.md, ROADMAP.md, docs/PRODUCT_EDGE_POSTURE.md, docs/ECOSYSTEM_CONTEXT.md according to canonical role

candidates.why_fragile: Reusable practice weakens when the catalog grows by wording variations instead of materially distinct patterns.
detection_hints: two techniques with the same trigger, same steps, and different names
repo-local examples dominate a supposedly reusable technique
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: one canonical technique with optional repo-local examples
never_delete_without: a surviving reusable technique for the pattern family

candidates.why_fragile: A skill that mostly restates a technique or owner runbook adds surface without adding a bounded execution contract.
detection_hints: skill has fuzzy trigger boundary
skill steps are copied from a repo-local source-of-truth or technique without additional execution semantics
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: the owner skill or technique with the clearer execution boundary
never_delete_without: a retained bounded workflow surface where one is materially needed

candidates.why_fragile: Routing becomes fragile when hints encode owner truth, workflow meaning, or confidence not grounded in receipts and bounded proof.
detection_hints: route hint answers what happened instead of where to go next
hint depends on memo-only recall or broad subjective confidence
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: thin navigation hints grounded in source receipts and bounded proof
never_delete_without: replacement navigation path for active consumers

candidates.why_fragile: Memo objects that imply live readiness or current truth erode the line between recall and proof.
detection_hints: object field names imply health, readiness, or certainty without evidence split
memory object triggers action without owner receipt or eval backing
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: reviewed recall objects with explicit trust posture and evidence refs
never_delete_without: migration notes for any consumer expecting the old object shape

candidates.why_fragile: Profiles that differ only by tone or vocabulary multiply handoff and memory posture ambiguity.
detection_hints: two profiles share the same role contract, handoff boundary, and evaluation posture
profile distinction is mostly narrative flavor
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: one explicit role contract with optional stylistic notes
never_delete_without: a surviving role contract for active handoffs

candidates.why_fragile: Scenario clones make recurring operations harder to audit and harder to route into correctly.
detection_hints: two playbooks differ only by example names
stress lane added without distinct threshold or fallback semantics
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: one scenario family with explicit forks only where thresholds truly differ
never_delete_without: a retained path for materially distinct operator flows

candidates.why_fragile: Generated packs that merely copy source text or lack strong provenance become stale shadow canon.
detection_hints: projection duplicates source with little added retrieval value
pack has weak provenance or unclear freshness
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: provenance-rich packs with real retrieval or aggregation value
never_delete_without: a check that active retrieval still has a source-first path

candidates.why_fragile: Overlapping bundles and composite prestige metrics invite evals to behave like workflow authority or scoreboard canon.
detection_hints: bundle set differs only by manifest shape
single composite score stands in for split-axis proof
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: bounded bundles with explicit blind spots and split-axis outputs
never_delete_without: coverage for any still-needed bounded claim family

candidates.why_fragile: Derived views that are thin, stale, or scalar-heavy linger as dashboard theater and invite false certainty.
detection_hints: view exists without clear downstream consumer
view compresses many signals into one score
low-evidence summaries are not suppressible
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: derived summaries with bounded meaning, suppression semantics, and clear consumers
never_delete_without: replacement access to any still-used summary signal

candidates.why_fragile: Helpers become dangerous when they embed routing or mutation policy that should stay source-owned and explicit.
detection_hints: wrapper makes hidden fallback or mutation decisions
helper convenience obscures which layer owns the decision
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: typed helper seams with explicit caller-supplied posture
never_delete_without: migration path for any consumer using the wrapper

candidates.why_fragile: Repair shortcuts without clear stop rules and receipts increase tail risk during operator stress.
detection_hints: repair loop retries without explicit threshold
runtime surface mutates state without a reviewable closeout or degradation receipt
candidates.preferred_keep_surface: repair-safe closeout and explicit degradation receipts
never_delete_without: a manual or bounded repair path that still works
